questionHtml: Determine the minimum area of the solar heating panel required to increase the temperature of all the water in the tank to 30°C during a time of 1.0 hour.
markschemeHtml:
energy required = 250 × 4200 × (30 − 15) ✓

energy available = 0.30 × 680 × t × A ✓

A = «250×4200×150.30×680×60×60=» 21 «m2» OR 22 «m2» ✓

 

Allow ECF from MP1 and MP2.

Accept the correct use of 0.30 in either MP1 or MP2.

meta.title: Determine the minimum area of the solar heating panel required to increase the temperature of all the water in the tank to 30°C during a time of 1.0 hour.
